headline: Ingersoll Rand Raises the Bar for Sustainable Performance
summary: Ingersoll Rand earns “A List” rating from CDP in the environmental stewardship category for the third year in a rowRanked #1 in North America and in the top 5% globally within the Machinery and Electrical Equipment industry on the 2025 S&P Global Corporate Sustainability Assessment.
